english: I have a reservation.
I'd like to check in.
What time is check-in?
Can I have the key to my room?
pinyin: néng gěi wǒ fángjiān yàoshi ma?
deTranslation: Könnte ich bitte den Schlüssel zu meinem Zimmer haben?

english: Is breakfast included?
Can I have a room with a view?
chinese: 我能要一个有风景的房间吗？
pinyin: wǒ néng yào yīgè yǒu fēngjǐng de fángjiān ma?
deTranslation: Könnte ich bitte ein Zimmer mit Aussicht haben?

english: My room is too noisy.
pinyin: wǒ de fángjiān tài chǎo le.

english: Can I have extra towels?
pinyin: néng duō gěi wǒ jǐ tiáo máojīn ma?
deTranslation: Könnte ich bitte zusätzliche Handtücher bekommen?

english: Is there a safe in the room?
pinyin: fángjiān lǐ yǒu bǎoxiǎn xiāng ma?
deTranslation: Gibt es einen Safe im Zimmer?

english: I need to use the internet.
Where is the swimming pool?
What time does the restaurant open?
deTranslation: Um wie viel Uhr öffnet das Restaurant?

english: Can I store my luggage here?
chinese: 我能把行李寄存在这里吗？
pinyin: wǒ néng bǎ xínglǐ jìcún zài zhèlǐ ma?
deTranslation: Kann ich mein Gepäck hier lagern?

english: Is there a gym?
How do I call the front desk?
I'd like to check out.
Can I have my bill, please?
deTranslation: Kann ich bitte meine Rechnung haben?

english: What time is checkout?
pinyin: tuì fáng shíjiān shì jǐ diǎn?

english: Can I leave my luggage here after checkout?
chinese: 退房后我能把行李留在这里吗？
pinyin: tuì fáng hòu wǒ néng bǎ xínglǐ liú zài zhèlǐ ma?
deTranslation: Kann ich mein Gepäck nach dem Check-out hier lassen?

english: Thank you for your help.
I lost my key.
The air conditioning is not working.
Can I have a wake-up call?
chinese: 能给我一个叫醒服务吗？
pinyin: néng gěi wǒ yīgè jiào xǐng fúwù ma?

english: Is there a laundry service?
Where can I get a taxi?
chinese: 我在哪里可以叫到出租车？
pinyin: wǒ zài nǎlǐ kěyǐ jiào dào chūzū chē?
deTranslation: Wo kann ich ein Taxi bekommen?

english: I need to extend my stay.
Can I change my room?
Do you have a map of the city?
What is the Wi-Fi password?
I have a complaint about my room.
pinyin: wǒ duì wǒ de fángjiān yǒu tóusù.
deTranslation: Ich habe eine Beschwerde bezüglich meines Zimmers.
